codeReview.summary: Implementation adds tool call verification infrastructure with ToolCallVerifier trait, VerificationResult/VerificationIssue types, and built-in verifiers (TimingVerifier, SchemaVerifier, SemanticVerifier, CompositeVerifier). Integration into service.rs MCP loops is correct using the builder pattern. Tests are comprehensive (18 total: 7 unit + 11 integration).

issues.description: SchemaVerifier's JSON validation is effectively dead code. Since ToolCallRecord.result is a serde_json::Value by construction, it can never represent invalid JSON. The check at line 113 will always succeed. The test at line 137 acknowledges this: 'Note: Since ToolCallRecord.result is a serde_json::Value, it can never represent invalid JSON by construction.' This verifier provides no real verification capability.

SemanticVerifier is a placeholder implementation. It always passes with 0.7 confidence and does not perform actual AI-based semantic validation. The model field has #[allow(dead_code)] because it's not used. Comment says 'In production, this would call self.model.complete() with a validation prompt.'

When verification fails (passed=false), only a warn! is logged but execution continues normally. This is acceptable for 'catch issues early' semantics but could be surprising if callers expect verification to prevent downstream issues.

TimingVerifier returns early when duration_ms > max_duration_ms, skipping the warn_ratio check at line 79. This means you cannot see both 'exceeded max' and 'exceeded warn_ratio' messages for the same call. This is intentional but worth noting - the more severe issue masks the warning threshold.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The AGENTS.md file does not document the new harness/verifier.rs module. The harness module now contains trajectory.rs, compactor.rs, and verifier.rs but AGENTS.md only mentions 'trajectory logging infrastructure'.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: AGENTS.md module table shows only 'harness' in service.rs description but no dedicated harness module documentation

sharedStateObservations.observation: ToolCallVerifier can be configured via with_tool_verifier() builder method but there is no corresponding config.toml section. Compare to trajectory_logger which also lacks config but is simpler (boolean enable).
sharedStateObservations.evidence: config/xiaomaolv.example.toml has no [agent.tool_verifier] or similar section

sharedStateObservations.observation: The plan document at docs/plans/2026-03-24-agent-harness-optimization.md exists and appears to be the source for this feature, but it's not linked or referenced in AGENTS.md. This makes it unclear where feature requirements originate.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: docs/plans/ directory exists but AGENTS.md has no reference to planning documents

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission directory with handoffs/ and worker-transcripts.jsonl does not exist at .factory/mission/. Cannot verify if worker followed skill procedure or review skillFeedback. Code review is based solely on diff and tests.

summary: Code quality review passed. Implementation correctly adds tool call verification infrastructure with proper trait design, comprehensive tests (18 passing), and correct integration into service.rs MCP loops. Non-blocking issues: SchemaVerifier is dead code (result is always valid JSON by construction), SemanticVerifier is a placeholder, and verification failures only log warnings without blocking execution. Documentation gaps exist for the new harness/verifier module and configuration.
